indications.text:
IBS with Constipation
Zelnorm® (tegaserod maleate) is indicated for the short-term treatment of women with irritable bowel
syndrome (IBS) whose primary bowel symptom is constipation.
The safety and effectiveness of Zelnorm in men with IBS with constipation have not been established.
Chronic Idiopath...

ZELNORM is indicated for the treatment of adult women less than 65 years of age with
irritable bowel syndrome with constipation (IBS-C).
Limitations of Use
• The safety and effectiveness of ZELNORM in men with IBS-C have not been established
[see Clinical Studies (14)].

Zelnorm™ (tegaserod maleate) is indicated for the short-term treatment of women with irritable bowel
syndrome (IBS) whose primary bowel symptom is constipation.
The safety and effectiveness of Zelnorm in men have not been established.
This label may not be the latest approved by FDA.
